    O

    OR - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.ConditionToken.Type
     
    OrCondition - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Condition that evaluates to true if at least one contained condition evaluates to true.
